action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current weather conditions including visibility and wind speed.

action_set_definitions.name: get_runway_arrival_sequence
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the ordered arrival queue for a specific runway.

action_set_definitions.name: get_flight_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific flight, including its wake turbulence category, current ETA, and descent status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_recat_eu_separation
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the required RECAT-EU longitudinal separation minima in Nautical Miles (NM) between a leading and trailing aircraft pair based on their wake categories.

lead_category.description: Wake category of the leading aircraft.

trail_category.description: Wake category of the trailing aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_pre_descent_speed_adjustment
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a flight's speed profile before it reaches Top of Descent (ToD) to achieve a target arrival time at the runway threshold.

target_eta_seconds.description: The new target Estimated Time of Arrival in seconds from epoch to ensure zero LFT.

state_description.aircraft_queue: An ordered list of aircraft objects currently in the arrival sequence, including their flight ID and current estimated time of arrival (ETA).
state_description.runway_status: A mapping of runway identifiers to their current availability status and the time the next landing slot becomes available.
state_description.flight_metadata: Detailed data for each flight, including wake turbulence category (Heavy/Medium/Light) and remaining fuel in minutes.
state_description.environmental_factors: Current conditions affecting landing, such as wind speed/direction and visibility markers.
